title: Bug: worker orphan recovery (GH #129)
description:
Epic: Worker Reliability — runtime orphan recovery

## GH Issue
https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/129

## Problem
Jobs stuck in OCR_STARTED forever when worker dies mid-batch. Only recovery = server restart → data loss. Orphan detection runs at startup only (worker.py:159).

## Scope
- Add periodic runtime orphan detection to worker loop (every N seconds)
- Check for jobs stuck in non-terminal states beyond a threshold
- Retry logic (reset to NOT_STARTED) not just terminate to error
- Optional: POST /api/jobs/{id}/retry endpoint for manual recovery
